title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RB750Gr3, hEX router
description: The hEX is a small five port Gigabit ethernet router in a nice plastic case for managing your wired SOHO network. Since v3 revision router has USB port and microSD slot The unit is equipped with a powerful 720MHz CPU, 64MB RAM, five Gigabit Ethernet ports and a RouterOS L4 license. The device supports 6-30V input voltage and passive PoE input
